protocols.Paper_title: An in-well direct lysis method for rapid detection of SARS-CoV-2 by real time RT-PCR in eSwab specimens
protocols.Evidence: IGEPAL-CA-630 was added to SARS-CoV-2 MM; crude sample was added directly to the PCR well containing MM.

protocols.Paper_title: An in-well direct lysis method for rapid detection of SARS-CoV-2 by real time RT-PCR in eSwab specimens
Detergent_products_unresolved_for_lysis: MagNA Pure 96 DNA and Viral NA Small Volume Kit
protocols.Evidence: rRT-PCR targeting the E-gene after purification of total NA on a MagNA Pure using the MagNA Pure DNA and Viral NA kit.
